title: WEFT Tool — Stash2Go Profile
description: Stash2Go profile of Tool. Extends the base Tool schema with Ravelry needle import tracking and custom tool source distinction.

stash2go.description: Stash2Go-specific fields that extend the generic WEFT Tool.

source.description: Whether this tool was created by the user or imported from Ravelry needle inventory.

ravelry_needle_id.description: Original Ravelry needle ID (when imported from Ravelry).

ravelry_updated_at.description: Last known Ravelry update timestamp (for sync).

assigned_project_ids.description: Stash2Go project IDs this tool is currently assigned to (richer than base project_assignments).

device_id.description: Device that created this tool entry.
